title: CompatSubmitReport
description: Envelope emitted by `aegis-boot compat --submit --json` — the draft-a-hardware-report flow. Collects DMI identity + builds a pre-filled GitHub issue URL the operator can open to file a report. Independent schema from [`CompatReport`] because the consumer contracts diverge: lookup drives scripted decisions, submit drives an operator workflow.

firmware.description: DMI BIOS label (vendor + version + date). Empty if unavailable.

model.description: DMI product label (name + version). Empty if unavailable.

submit_url.description: Pre-filled GitHub issue URL with `vendor`, `model`, `firmware`, and `aegis-version` query-string parameters set from DMI.

tool.description: Always `"aegis-boot"`. Deliberately named `tool` (not `tool_version`) to match the existing wire format; this envelope carries the draft template, not a version pin.
